title: Dijital Dedektifler
description: İstanbul Kadıköy'de yaşayan üç arkadaşın sahte bir haberi araştırarak dijital okuryazarlığın önemini keşfettiği güncel ve eğitici bir macera hikayesi.
style: 3D Pixar animated movie style with modern urban Istanbul setting, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail, Disney Pixar render quality, realistic Turkish neighborhood backgrounds, tech-savvy digital world elements, expressive character animation

characterDescription.base: a child with the EXACT same facial features as the reference photo, rendered in 3D Pixar style with expressive eyes, detailed skin textures, and natural hair matching the photo exactly
characterDescription.notes: Dijital okuryazarlık temalı hikaye - çocuk bir teknoloji meraklısı dedektif olarak tasvir edilmeli, Kadıköy İstanbul'da geçiyor

outfit.description: wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar, dark jogger pants, futuristic white sneakers
outfit.nameLocation: on a name badge clipped to the jacket collar

scenes.title: Şok Edici Haber
scenes.text:
İstanbul'un Kadıköy ilçesinde, yan yana oturan üç yakın arkadaş vardı: On bir yaşında teknoloji meraklısı Kaan, on yaşında araştırmacı ruhu olan Selin ve on bir yaşında fotoğrafçılığı seven Berk.
Bir öğleden sonra Selin heyecanla arkadaşlarının yanına koştu:
"Çocuklar, büyük haber! Okulumuz kapanıyormuş!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA LOW ANGLE from street level looking up at the three children, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, alongside friends Selin a 10-year-old girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie with a small notebook tucked under her arm and Berk an 11-year-old boy with a vintage film camera hanging around his neck wearing a green cargo vest, all three standing together on a vibrant sunny cobblestone street in Istanbul Kadikoy neighborhood, Selin holding up her phone screen toward Kaan and Berk showing a shocking news headline with large alarming red text, Kaan leaning forward with narrowed suspicious eyes and one eyebrow raised examining the screen critically, Berk looking over Selin's shoulder with wide surprised eyes and mouth slightly open, Selin's expression worried and urgent, warm golden afternoon sunlight casting long shadows down the narrow street, colorful Turkish shop signs in blue and red hanging above old wooden doorways, traditional Kadikoy apartment buildings with wrought iron balconies and flower pots lining the street, a distant mosque minaret visible in the hazy background, scattered autumn leaves on the cobblestones, a stray cat sitting on a doorstep watching the children, bustling neighborhood atmosphere with hints of Turkish tea glasses on a cafe table nearby, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Şüpheli İşaretler
scenes.text:
Selin telefonunu gösterdi. Ekranda büyük harflerle yazılmış bir haber vardı:
"SON DAKİKA: Kadıköy'deki Tüm Okullar Kapanıyor!"
Kaan haberi dikkatlice okudu. Bir şeyler garip görünüyordu.
"Dur bir dakika" dedi Kaan. "Bu sitede birçok yazım hatası var. Ve bu siteyi daha önce hiç duymadım."
Berk de baktı. "Haberdeki fotoğraf da garip görünüyor. Sanki başka bir yerden alınmış."
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA CLOSE-UP on the phone screen with the children's faces reflected in the glass, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie and Berk a boy with a vintage film camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest, all three huddled tightly together around Selin's smartphone, the phone screen dominating the foreground showing a suspicious news article with large alarming red headlines and obvious spelling errors circled in glowing highlights, Kaan pointing at a misspelled word on the screen with his index finger his expression deeply skeptical with furrowed brows and a slight frown, Berk squinting at the article photo on screen noticing it looks manipulated his camera expertise showing in his analytical gaze, Selin holding the phone with both hands looking worried and uncertain biting her lower lip slightly, dramatic cool blue-white light from the phone screen illuminating their faces from below creating cinematic under-lighting shadows on their features, the Kadikoy street behind them softly blurred with warm golden bokeh lights from shop windows contrasting the cold phone glow, late afternoon transitioning to early evening with deep orange sky visible above the buildings, tension and suspicion palpable in their body language as they lean in close to the screen, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Dijital Dedektifler Olalım
scenes.text:
Kaan bir fikir önerdi: "Dijital dedektif olalım! Bu haberin gerçek olup olmadığını araştıralım."
"Nasıl yapacağız?" diye sordu Selin.
"İlk adım: Haberi resmi kaynaklardan kontrol etmek. Milli Eğitim Bakanlığı'nın sitesine bakalım."
Resmi sitede okulların kapanacağına dair hiçbir bilgi yoktu.
"İlk ipucu: Resmi kaynaklar bu haberi doğrulamıyor!" dedi Kaan not alarak.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA FROM BEHIND looking over the shoulder, CAMERA OVER THE SHOULDER looking at the laptop screen from behind Kaan, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, sitting at a cluttered desk in his bedroom typing on a silver laptop keyboard with focused determination checking an official Turkish government education website with a formal blue header and official seal visible on screen, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie sitting to his right taking detailed notes in a spiral notebook with a purple pen underlining key findings and writing checkmarks, and Berk a boy with a vintage camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest leaning over Kaan's other shoulder pointing at something on the screen with an investigative expression, a large whiteboard mounted on the wall behind them covered with colorful sticky notes red string connections between clues and handwritten detective notes with checkmarks and X marks, bright warm desk lamp casting focused yellow light on the workspace while the rest of the room has softer ambient blue evening light from the window, posters of technology heroes and a world map on the bedroom walls, scattered papers and a magnifying glass on the desk, concentrated investigation atmosphere with the children deeply absorbed in their research, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Kaynak Araştırması
scenes.text:
İkinci adım: Haberin kaynağını araştırmak.
Kaan haberi yayınlayan siteyi inceledi.
"Bu site daha iki hafta önce kurulmuş. Yazarın adı yok. İletişim bilgisi yok. 'Hakkımızda' sayfası boş."
Selin ekledi: "Güvenilir haber siteleri yazar adı ve iletişim bilgisi paylaşır. Bu sitenin hiçbiri yok!"
"İkinci ipucu: Kaynak güvenilir değil!" dedi Kaan defterine yazarak.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA FROM THE SIDE showing depth of the room, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie and Berk a boy with a vintage camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest, all three gathered around a desktop computer in a cozy neighborhood library or internet cafe with tall wooden bookshelves lining the walls and warm reading lamps on tables, the computer screen showing a basic poorly designed suspicious website with missing author information and empty About page highlighted in glowing red warning circles, Kaan standing and pointing at the screen with authority explaining the website red flags to his friends his expression serious and determined like a real detective, Selin sitting in a wooden chair marking notes with a red pen in her notebook circling key findings and underlining suspicious elements, Berk crouching beside the desk examining the screen closely with a photographer's analytical eye, warm overhead pendant lights casting pools of golden light on the wooden tables, other library patrons visible in the soft background reading quietly, stacks of books and a Turkish tea glass on the table next to the computer, dust motes floating in the warm light beams from a nearby window, focused analytical investigation atmosphere, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Sahte Fotoğraf
scenes.text:
Üçüncü adım: Görselleri kontrol etmek.
Berk fotoğrafçılık bilgisini kullandı. Haberdeki fotoğrafı tersine görsel aramayla kontrol ettiler.
"Buldum!" dedi Berk. "Bu fotoğraf iki yıl önce başka bir şehirde çekilmiş. Haberin fotoğrafı çalıntı!"
Selin şaşkındı: "Yani fotoğrafı başka bir haberden alıp buraya koymuşlar?"
"Aynen öyle" dedi Berk. "Üçüncü ipucu: Görsel sahte!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA POV of the computer monitor showing the split screen results, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie and Berk a boy with a vintage camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest, all three in a bright school computer lab with rows of modern desktop computers and educational posters about internet safety on the walls, the main computer screen dominating the composition showing a reverse image search result with the screen split down the middle displaying the fake news photo on the left side and the original photo from two years ago on the right side with a different city name and date clearly visible, a green matching percentage badge glowing on screen, Berk standing up from his chair pointing excitedly at the screen match with his index finger his face lit up with the thrill of discovery and a wide triumphant grin, Kaan leaning back in his chair with arms crossed nodding with a knowing satisfied expression, Selin's eyes wide behind her glasses mouth open in amazement as she connects the dots, bright fluorescent school lighting mixed with the cool blue glow from multiple computer screens around the lab, a teacher's desk visible in the background with a globe and books, school chairs and desks arranged in neat rows, the atmosphere electric with the excitement of cracking the case, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Sonuç: Yalan Haber
scenes.text:
Araştırma tamamlandı. Selin bulgularını özetledi:
"Birincisi: Resmi kaynaklar haberi doğrulamıyor.
İkincisi: Haber sitesi güvenilir değil.
Üçüncüsü: Fotoğraf çalıntı ve sahte."
Kaan sonucu açıkladı: "Bu haber kesinlikle yalan haber! Birisi insanları korkutmak veya tıklanma almak için uydurmuş."
Berk üzgündü: "Ama buna çok kişi inanmış. Ne yapacağız?"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA MEDIUM SHOT from slight diagonal angle capturing the evidence board and all three children, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie and Berk a boy with a vintage camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest, all three standing in Kaan's bedroom in front of a large whiteboard that has been transformed into a detective-style evidence board covered with printed photos connected by red string lines handwritten bullet points in different colored markers and sticky notes with checkmarks and X marks pinned up with colorful magnets, Selin standing confidently in the center presenting the summary with one hand gesturing at the board and the other holding her open notebook filled with organized notes, Kaan standing to her left with arms crossed and a determined resolute expression nodding in agreement his jaw set with certainty, Berk on the right looking concerned with furrowed brows and hands in his vest pockets worried about people who believed the fake news, warm late afternoon golden light streaming through the bedroom window casting dramatic shadows across the evidence board, the desk lamp also illuminating the board creating a focused spotlight effect, Kaan's bedroom details visible including tech posters a bookshelf with coding books and a small robot figurine on the desk, the atmosphere serious and conclusive like the final scene of a detective movie, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Sınıf Sunumu
scenes.text:
Ertesi gün okulda arkadaşlarına durumu anlattılar.
"Bu haber yalan!" dedi Kaan sınıfın önünde. "Ve biz bunu nasıl anladığımızı göstereceğiz."
Üçü birlikte araştırma adımlarını sınıfa sundu.
Öğretmenleri Elif Hanım çok etkilendi: "Harika bir iş çıkardınız. Her habere hemen inanmamak gerektiğini gösterdiniz."
Sınıf arkadaşları alkışladı.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC CAMERA FROM THE BACK of the classroom looking toward the front where the three children present, CHARACTER_DESC as tech-savvy Kaan wearing a cool tech-style light gray jacket with neon blue LED-like trim lines and a {CHILD_NAME} name badge clipped to the collar dark jogger pants and futuristic white sneakers, standing confidently at the front of a bright colorful Turkish school classroom next to a large projected presentation screen showing their fake news investigation steps with numbered bullet points and evidence screenshots, Kaan pointing at the screen with a laser pointer his posture upright and confident like a young professor, alongside friends Selin a girl with round glasses and a purple hoodie standing to the left holding her notebook ready to answer questions, and Berk a boy with a vintage camera around his neck wearing a green cargo vest standing to the right with his arms proudly behind his back, rows of diverse Turkish classmates sitting at wooden desks seen from behind their heads turned toward the presenters some clapping enthusiastically some raising hands to ask questions, a proud female teacher Elif Hanim with dark hair in a neat bun and a warm cardigan standing to the side near the window smiling broadly with her hands clasped together in admiration, bright morning sunlight flooding through large classroom windows with cheerful educational posters about reading and science on the yellow walls, a Turkish flag and Ataturk portrait visible above the blackboard, colorful student artwork pinned to a bulletin board, the atmosphere warm proud and celebratory, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

scenes.title: Kulüp Kuruluşu
scenes.text:
Elif Hanım bir öneride bulundu:
"Neden bir 'Dijital Dedektifler Kulübü' kurmuyorsunuz? Okuldaki diğer öğrencilere de bu becerileri öğretebilirsiniz."
Üç arkadaş heyecanla kabul etti.
Kulübün kurallarını belirlediler:
1. Her haberi sorgulamak
2. Kaynağı kontrol etmek
3. Görselleri araştırmak
4. Paylaşmadan önce doğrulamak
5. Başkalarını da eğitmek

scenes.title: Küçük Öğrenciye Yardım
scenes.text:
Haftalar geçti. Kulüp büyüdü ve okuldaki öğrencilere çok yardımcı oldu.
Bir gün küçük sınıflardan bir öğrenci Selin'e koşarak geldi:
"Abla, internette biri bana 'Tebrikler bir ödül kazandınız, bilgilerinizi girin' diyor. Ne yapmalıyım?"
Selin gülümsedi. "Harika bir soru! Gel, birlikte bunun bir dolandırıcılık olup olmadığını kontrol edelim."
Birlikte incelediler ve bunun bir internet dolandırıcılığı olduğunu buldular. Küçük öğrenci çok rahatladı.

scenes.title: Dijital Kahramanlar
scenes.text:
Yıl sonunda okul müdürü özel bir törenle Dijital Dedektifler Kulübü'nü ödüllendirdi.
"Bu üç öğrenci" dedi müdür, "bize dijital dünyada dikkatli olmanın önemini hatırlattı. Onlar gerçek birer dijital kahraman!"
Kaan, Selin ve Berk sahneye çıktı. Kaan mikrofonu aldı:
"Unutmayın: İnternette gördüğünüz her şey doğru değildir. Sormak, araştırmak ve doğrulamak en büyük süper gücümüzdür."
Selin ekledi: "Gerçek, arayanı bulur."
Salon alkışlarla doldu.

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 💡
facts: İlk bilgisayar virüsü 1986 yılında ortaya çıkmıştır!
Dünyada her gün 3.5 milyar Google araması yapılır!
İlk emoji 1999 yılında Japonya da tasarlanmıştır!
Yapay zeka satranç ta dünya şampiyonunu 1997 yılında yenmiştir!
İnternette her dakika 500 saatlik video YouTube a yüklenir!

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🔍
facts: Siber güvenlik uzmanları beyaz şapkalı hacker olarak da bilinir!
Güçlü bir şifre en az 12 karakter uzunluğunda olmalıdır!
QR kodları ilk olarak 1994 yılında Japonya da geliştirilmiştir!
Dünyada 4.5 milyardan fazla insan interneti aktif olarak kullanır!
İlk cep telefonu görüşmesi 1973 yılında yapılmıştır!
